info.title: Dastyare Social — CS
info.description: REST API for Dastyare Social Creator Studio. Manage posts (threads, shorts, media) and stories. Supports JSON and multipart uploads, reactions, views, and likes. Authentication via Better Auth (bearer token or API key). See /llms.txt for LLM-oriented documentation.

tags.name: Posts
tags.description: Create, read, update, and delete posts. Supports text, image, video, voice, and file types. Includes reactions and view tracking.

tags.name: Stories
tags.description: Ephemeral image and video stories with view and like counters.
